languages.text: {n}Себериан резко тянет руку к оружию и аугментированные пальцы с шипением смыкаются на рукояти.{/n} "Откуда вам известно это имя? Кому еще вы об этом рассказали? Постойте, вы же не…" {n}Сделав одному ему понятный вывод, Вольный Торговец расслабляется.{/n} "Я сохраню вашу личность в тайне. Амелла — моя единомышленница и покровительница, я верил, что она не оставит меня отбиваться от Диодаса в одиночку".

{n}Seberian's hand darts toward his weapon, the augmented fingers locking around the grip with a hiss.{/n} "How do you know that name? Who else have you told? Wait a moment. You can't be..." {n}Coming to some conclusion known only to him, the Rogue Trader relaxes.{/n} "I will keep your identity a secret. Amella is my ally and protector, and I had faith that she would not leave me to fend off Diodas alone."

Постойте, вы же не…" {n}Сделав одному ему понятный вывод, Вольный Торговец расслабляется.{/n} "Я сохраню вашу личность в тайне. Амелла — моя единомышленница и покровительница, я верил, что она не оставит меня отбиваться от Диодаса в одиночку".

Amella is my confederate and protector, and I had faith that she would not leave me to fend off Diodas alone."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安的手猛地伸向武器，加装了植入物的手指伴着嘶的一声紧扣住剑柄。{/n}“你怎么会知道那个名字？你还告诉了谁？等一下，你该不会是……”{n}行商浪人暗自想通了什么，神色缓和下来。{/n}“你的身份我会替你保密。阿梅拉是我的盟友，也是我的守护者，我相信她不会让我独自对抗狄奥达斯。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's hand darts toward his weapon, the augmented fingers locking around the grip with a hiss.{/n} "How do you know that name? Who else have you told? Wait a moment. You can't be..." {n}Coming to some conclusion known only to him, the Rogue Trader relaxes.{/n} "I will keep your identity a secret. Amella is my ally and protector, and I had faith that she would not leave me to fend off Diodas alone."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安的手猛地伸向武器，加装了植入物的手指伴着嘶的一声紧扣住剑柄。{/n}“你怎么会知道那个名字？你还告诉了谁？等一下，你该不会是……”{n}行商浪人暗自想通了什么，神色缓和下来。{/n}“你的身份我会替你保密。阿梅拉是我的盟友，也是我的守护者，我相信她不会让我独自对抗狄奥达斯。”

languages.text: {n}La main de Seberian bondit en direction de son arme et ses doigts augmentés se referment sur la poignée avec un grincement.{/n} « Comment connaissez-vous ce nom ? À qui d'autre en avez-vous parlé ? Une minute, vous ne seriez pas... » {n}Parvenu à une conclusion connue de lui seul, le libre-marchand se détend.{/n} « Je garderai votre identité secrète. Amella est mon alliée et ma protectrice, et j'avais bon espoir qu'elle ne me laisserait pas seul aux prises avec Diodas. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's hand darts toward his weapon, the augmented fingers locking around the grip with a hiss.{/n} "How do you know that name? Who else have you told? Wait a moment. You can't be..." {n}Coming to some conclusion known only to him, the Rogue Trader relaxes.{/n} "I will keep your identity a secret. Amella is my ally and protector, and I had faith that she would not leave me to fend off Diodas alone."

À qui d'autre en avez-vous parlé ? Une minute, vous ne seriez pas... » {n}Parvenu à une conclusion connue de lui seul, le libre-marchand se détend.{/n} « Je garderai votre identité secrète. Amella est mon alliée et ma protectrice, et j'avais bon espoir qu'elle ne me laisserait pas seul aux prises avec Diodas. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ın eli bir anda silahına gidiyor, ogmentli parmakları kabzayı sararken bir tıslama duyuluyor.{/n} "Sen bu ismi nereden biliyorsun? Başkalarına da anlattın mı? Dur, sen..." {n}Sadece kendisinin farkında olduğu bir çıkarıma varan Hür Tacir rahatlıyor.{/n} "Kimliğini sır olarak saklayacağım. Amella benim müttefikimdir, koruyucumdur. Ayrıca Diodas'ı defetme mücadelemde beni yalnız bırakmayacağına olan inancım tamdı."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's hand darts toward his weapon, the augmented fingers locking around the grip with a hiss.{/n} "How do you know that name? Who else have you told? Wait a moment. You can't be..." {n}Coming to some conclusion known only to him, the Rogue Trader relaxes.{/n} "I will keep your identity a secret. Amella is my ally and protector, and I had faith that she would not leave me to fend off Diodas alone."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ın eli bir anda silahına gidiyor, ogmentli parmakları kabzayı sararken bir tıslama duyuluyor.{/n} "Sen bu ismi nereden biliyorsun? Başkalarına da anlattın mı? Dur, sen..." {n}Sadece kendisinin farkında olduğu bir çıkarıma varan Hür Tacir rahatlıyor.{/n} "Kimliğini sır olarak saklayacağım. Amella benim müttefikimdir, koruyucumdur. Ayrıca Diodas'ı defetme mücadelemde beni yalnız bırakmayacağına olan inancım tamdı."

languages.text: {n}Seberian se lleva la mano al arma, sujetando la empuñadura con mano siseante.{/n} «¿Cómo conoce ese nombre? ¿A quién más se lo ha contado? Un momento, no será...». {n}El Comerciante Independiente llega a una conclusión que no comparte y se relaja.{/n} «Guardaré el secreto de su identidad. Amella es mi aliada y protectora, y estaba seguro de que no me abandonaría contra Diodas».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's hand darts toward his weapon, the augmented fingers locking around the grip with a hiss.{/n} "How do you know that name? Who else have you told? Wait a moment. You can't be..." {n}Coming to some conclusion known only to him, the Rogue Trader relaxes.{/n} "I will keep your identity a secret. Amella is my ally and protector, and I had faith that she would not leave me to fend off Diodas alone."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian se lleva la mano al arma, sujetando la empuñadura con mano siseante.{/n} «¿Cómo conoce ese nombre? ¿A quién más se lo ha contado? Un momento, no será...». {n}El Comerciante Independiente llega a una conclusión que no comparte y se relaja.{/n} «Guardaré el secreto de su identidad. Amella es mi aliada y protectora, y estaba seguro de que no me abandonaría contra Diodas».

languages.text: {n}Seberians Hand greift nach seiner Waffe und seine augmentierten Finger schließen sich zischend um deren Griff.{/n} "Woher kennt Ihr diesen Namen? Mit wem habt Ihr noch gesprochen? Wartet einen Moment. Das ist unmöglich ..." {n}Als er zu einem Schluss kommt, den nur er kennt, entspannt sich der Freihändler.{/n} "Ich werde Eure Identität geheim halten. Amella ist meine Verbündete und Beschützerin, und ich hatte gehofft, sie würde mich im Kampf gegen Diodas nicht allein lassen."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's hand darts toward his weapon, the augmented fingers locking around the grip with a hiss.{/n} "How do you know that name? Who else have you told? Wait a moment. You can't be..." {n}Coming to some conclusion known only to him, the Rogue Trader relaxes.{/n} "I will keep your identity a secret. Amella is my ally and protector, and I had faith that she would not leave me to fend off Diodas alone."

Mit wem habt Ihr noch gesprochen? Wartet einen Moment. Das ist unmöglich ..." {n}Als er zu einem Schluss kommt, den nur er kennt, entspannt sich der Freihändler.{/n} "Ich werde Eure Identität geheim halten. Amella ist meine Verbündete und Beschützerin, und ich hatte gehofft, sie würde mich im Kampf gegen Diodas nicht allein lassen."

languages.text: {n}シベリアンの手は武器の方へ素早く伸び、強化された指がヒスッという音と共にグリップを掴む。{/n}「その名前をどうして知っていたのですか？他に誰に話したのですか？待ってください。あなたは...」{n}彼にしかわからない結論に達したかのように、ローグトレーダーはリラックスする。{/n}「あなたの身元は秘密にしておく。アメラは私の同盟者であり、私の守護者であり、私は彼女がディオダスと1人で戦うことを許さないだろうと信じていた。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's hand darts toward his weapon, the augmented fingers locking around the grip with a hiss.{/n} "How do you know that name? Who else have you told? Wait a moment. You can't be..." {n}Coming to some conclusion known only to him, the Rogue Trader relaxes.{/n} "I will keep your identity a secret. Amella is my ally and protector, and I had faith that she would not leave me to fend off Diodas alone."

traits.locale_text: {n}シベリアンの手は武器の方へ素早く伸び、強化された指がヒスッという音と共にグリップを掴む。{/n}「その名前をどうして知っていたのですか？他に誰に話したのですか？待ってください。あなたは...」{n}彼にしかわからない結論に達したかのように、ローグトレーダーはリラックスする。{/n}「あなたの身元は秘密にしておく。アメラは私の同盟者であり、私の守護者であり、私は彼女がディオダスと1人で戦うことを許さないだろうと信じていた。」
